exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your creative freelancing forward
items: Create a comprehensive portfolio of your 10 best creative works and upload them to a professional platform
Research and document 5 direct competitors in your creative niche, analyzing their services, pricing, and client positioning
Define your ideal client avatar by creating a detailed profile of your perfect customer, including their industry, budget range, and project preferences
Calculate your minimum viable hourly rate by analyzing your monthly expenses, desired income, and billable hours capacity
Inventory and assess all your current creative skills, tools, and equipment to identify gaps that need investment before launching
Set up a professional business structure by registering your freelance business name and obtaining necessary licenses or permits
